
##### CMD: soc #####
soc
  Unit 0 Driver Control Structure:
  Chip=BCM56340_A0 Rev=0x01 Driver=BCM56340_A0
  Flags=0x40143: attached initialized mem-clear-use-dma ipmc-repl-shared; board type 0x0
  CM: Base=0xa6590000
  Disabled: reg_flags=0x100 mem_flags=0x0
  SchanOps=16783369 MMUdbg=0 LinkPause=0
  Counter: int=2000000us per=2123095us dmaBuf=0xa58d4b00
           EvictInvalidPoolIdCount=0
  Timeout: Schan=0(300000us) MIIM=0(1000000us)
  Intr: Total=31783 Sc=0 ScErr=0 MMU/ARLErr=0
        LinkStat=0 PCIfatal=0 PCIparity=0
        ARLdrop=0 ARLmbuf=0 ARLxfer=0 ARLcnt0=0
        TableDMA=26101 TSLAM-DMA=212 CCM-DMA=0 SW=0
        MemCmd[BSE]=0 MemCmd[CSE]=0 MemCmd[HSE]=0
        ChipFunc[0]=0 ChipFunc[1]=0 ChipFunc[2]=0
        ChipFunc[3]=0 ChipFunc[4]=0
        FifoDma[0]=0 FifoDma[1]=0 FifoDma[2]=0 FifoDma[3]=0
        I2C=0 MII=0 StatsDMA=0 Desc=2380 Chain=4022
  Error: SDRAM=0 CFAP=0 Fcell=0 MmuSR=0
  SER events(mem=0 reg=0 nak=0 stat=0 ecc=0 direct=0 fifo=0 tcam=0)
  SER corrections(fix=0 clear=0 restore=0 special=0 err:0)
  PKT DMA: dcb=t23 tpkt=3984 tbyt=545963 rpkt=3603 rbyt=447024
  DV: List: max-q=32 cur-tq=4 cur-rq=0 dv-size=160
  DV: Statistics: allocs=3870 frees=3854 alloc-q=3850
  Mem cache (count=273 size=9480728 vmap size=94091 errmap size=3008)
  Reg cache (count=30 size=3223200)
  dma-ch-0 TX Idle   Queue=0 ((nil)) default intr mbm
  dma-ch-1 RX Active Queue=16 (0xa2bd1350) default intr mbm
  dma-ch-2 -- Idle   Queue=0 ((nil)) intr mbm
